query:
SELECT
                u.id,
                u.email,
                u.created_at AS "created_at!",
                u.updated_at AS "updated_at!",
                COALESCE(
                    ARRAY_AGG(ur.role ORDER BY ur.role) FILTER (WHERE ur.role IS NOT NULL),
                    '{}'
                ) AS "roles!"
            FROM auth.users u
            LEFT JOIN auth.users_roles ur ON ur.user_id = u.id
            GROUP BY u.id
            ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
